name: Travelers - Explore the World Heritages in XR

reviews.review_title: Not as good as i hoped
reviews.review_description:
I was extremely excited about this app when I saw it on a YouTube video. Unfortunately I was quickly disabused of my enthusiasm on entering the first room Hintzes Hall in the Natural History Museum London. I'd visited this same room on another app which was far superior  graphically. The same result  to stonehenge, different app, better quality. On the 3rd map I fell through the map on an endless loop and gave up at that point.
I hope improvements can be made in the future as it has great potential to be a wonderful " travel/exploration/educational" app.
Shiwing liw memory and crashing ! Nothing is interesting in this app

developer_response.body: We are sory to hear that. If you find nothing interesting in the app, we will be very happy to refund you purchase.

reviews.review_title: Travelers Explore The World. Why Not?
reviews.review_description:
I wish I could give this app 10 stars out of 5. Very good app. Great app. Brink VR, Blue Planet VR, this app is definitely in the club. There are some sites from Puzzling Places that are featured in this app! Visit these places in full scale! And there is an option for an audio guided tour.
This app is the Sterling silver, platinum grade, fine caviar, 24K gold, Michelin 3 star award winning app that is a must get for anyone who wishes to travel vicariously or otherwise. I can not write enough words as to how great this app is. It is stunning and spectacular.

reviews.review_title: Great idea but needs some work
reviews.review_description:
The app crashed on me 3 times within 15min when trying to download several locations at once, due to low memory. 

Would like to choose between ai voices. Several times the ai didnt finish sentences before starting new ones. 

I still enjoyed the experience. Nice to have comfort mode options, movement speed and smooth turning customization

developer_response.body: Thanks RoaminRound. We will try to fix the issues you mentioned in the further versions. Thanks to your feedback, we will continue to improve Travelers and add new sites.

reviews.review_description: 5/25/2024. Dev has fixed many of my complaints in updates. You can now turn off the movement blinders and enjoy the view. They also added on smooth turning. Some of the locations look better. Please continue to add locations. I talked to someone at the Stonehenge area today it was cool. He was on a phone app. Places look nothing like the trailer video.  Stuff is a jumbled mess. Can’t even tell what most of the stuff is supposed to be in the museum one and the other placrs. Can’t turn movement blinders off. It comes in really small like a round circle when your moving how am I suppose to enjoy walking around. It has no smooth turning options only snap turning. Waste of money.

developer_response.body:
Hello Infernonine,

It is great to see that you have increased the star points from 1 to 3. Travelers is still under development process and we are improving it in according to your valuable feedbacks. There is some restrictions on the Quest Store like frame rate for the applications, so we had to use simplified 3D models in the app. Currently we are adding new heritage sites and  trying to find a way to improve photogrammetric 3D model qualities in the app. Thanks a lot for your valuable feedbacks.

reviews.review_title: A travel app with rich content
reviews.review_description: I really like this app that allows you to move between realistic places in VR. I definitely recommend it.
